summary: Independent gate_evidence review passed: tolerance fix correctly scoped (dot entries + story-level [A-Za-z0-9_-]+.json only), ENOTDIR fail-loud preserved for extensionless stage impostors, recorded evidence honestly matches reality (content_binding sha256 of both bound surfaces re-verified against the worktree; 20/20 targeted suite log and typecheck log cross-checked). Findings: 3 info + 1 minor (uncommitted replay script — mitigated by committed CARS tests pinning the same spec clauses).

inspection.summary: Reviewer read the review request, full main...HEAD diff, safeReaddirDirectories and both stage-collection callers (583/1176), verified agent-review.js writes dispatch-authorizations.json (3258) and mkdir-based .dispatch.lock (3434) under the review root, confirmed CARS-S-1/S-2/S-3 plus the pre-existing ENOTDIR test pin CARS-S-1..S-5, and cross-checked verification-evidence.json content_binding hashes, /tmp/cars-test-output.txt (20/20) and /tmp/cars-typecheck.log.

judgment_delta: Initial concerns: (a) *.json tolerance could mask a corrupted stage like gate.json, (b) evidence-reuse flagged stale for current head -> final pass because stage dirs are never *.json-named, the realistic corruption shape stays ENOTDIR fail-loud per spec INV-001 with an existing pinned test, and the staleness was only a docs-commit head move while both content_binding sha256 hashes match the current files under the content-surface policy.
